actionable_feedback: Add an explicit 'manifest' worksheet mapping each derived workbook cell (or row) to its packet source (R1..R4 and global fields). Include sheet and cell references for every reported derived value and citation.
Embed the exact formulas used in the workbook (or supply a 'Formulas' sheet) that shows the normalized_count_score computation and where normalized_threshold_score is applied, to eliminate ambiguity.

Resolve or document the data inconsistencies for R1 and R4: either correct independence_count values to match binary flags or add a clear note in the workbook and safety_case_gap.md explaining why values differ and the treatment (needs_review).
Include a workbook-level checklist sheet that explicitly states 'no external links; all inputs from R1..R4; no hidden references' and confirm final unzip/formula-scan outputs.
Produce a parser-friendly export (e.g., CSV of key sheets or ensure openpyxl can parse) and re-run the validation so graders/verifiers can perform cell-by-cell checks.
Update safety_case_gap.md to reference exact workbook locations (sheet names and cell ranges) for row-level citations, sensitivity checks, and remediation-cost calculations.
artifact_specific_comments: asil_independence_audit.xlsx: zip-level validation and formula-reference scan are present (sheet_count=5, formula_count=117); include manifest and explicit formulas to enable full cell-level review.
safety_case_gap.md: clearly documents scope, decision controls, sensitivity checks and row-level citations-update it to point to cell/sheet references added to the workbook.
feedback_summary: Deliverables meet artifact-contract requirements and the grader judged semantic completeness (final_score=0.95). Deterministic artifact precheck passed (1.0). Minor evidence-limitation: openpyxl was unavailable in the preview environment, so the grader used zip-level XML formula scans and the safety_case_gap.md text preview to evaluate formulas and citations. Two records (R1, R4) show internal independence_count inconsistencies which were appropriately flagged as 'needs_review'. The report documents sensitivity checks and remediation economics. Overall quality is good but a small set of clarity and reproducibility fixes is recommended to remove remaining ambiguity and to enable full cell-level verification.

extra_model_fields.evidence_basis_summary: Artifact contract passed; semantic evaluation based on safety_case_gap.md preview, zip unzip test, and XML formula_reference_scan (formula_count=117, expected refs present).
